actionCalls.description: Creates closing reports for the selected workers.
actionCalls.name: Create_Closing_Reports
actionCalls.label: Create Closing Reports

assignments.description: This is a live closing report for the current target contact, that is not in a cancelled state and therefor the Job is not valid
assignments.name: Assign_Invalid_Job
assignments.label: Assign Invalid Job

assignments.name: Set_Cell_Resource_Id_To_Target
assignments.label: Set Cell Resource Id To Target

assignments.name: SetNoClosingReportPermissionsMessage
assignments.label: Set No Closing Report Permissions Message

value.stringValue: You do not have sufficient permissions to create a Closing Report

decisions.description: If the input date still isn't set, then the date would have been displayed as a parameter and thus the value there must be used
decisions.name: Was_Date_Set_From_Params
decisions.label: Was Date Set From Params

formulas.description: The formatted text of the selected value of the Highest Severity Broken picklist, provided to the Find Work component.
formulas.name: Max_Severity

loops.name: Loop_Closing_Reports_To_get_Invalid_Jobs
loops.label: Loop Closing Reports To get Invalid Jobs

loops.name: Loop_Closing_Reports_To_Get_Valid_Jobs
loops.label: Loop Closing Reports To Get Valid Jobs

recordLookups.name: Get_Jobs_With_Coords
recordLookups.label: Get Jobs With Coords
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 7 AND (5 OR 6)

fields.name: General_Error_Message
fields.fieldText:
An error occurred. {!$Flow.FaultMessage}


JobId = {!Query_Selected_Job.Id}

personPlaced = {!target}

endDate ={!Query_Selected_Job.TR1__Estimated_End_Date__c}

startDate ={!Query_Selected_Job.TR1__Estimated_Start_Date__c}

fields.name: ParamsTitle
fields.fieldText: This action allows you to find Jobs for a worker.

fields.name: ScreenParmDate
fields.helpText: The date from which the search will start from

fields.name: Minimum_Percentage
fields.helpText: Choose how good a match the worker must be for the job. Workers with a match percentage less than this are not considered. A 100% match means the Worker is a perfect match for the job.

fields.name: Highest_Severity_Broken
fields.helpText: The worker's match percentage is reduced when certain rules are broken. However, rules have a severity and this is used to make sure that workers with broken rules with severities higher than this selection are not considered. If any broken rule should exclude the worker choose “None”. If no broken rule should exclude the worker choose “Fatal”.

fields.name: Maximum_Distance_Override
fields.helpText: Workers are only considered if they live within a default as-the-crow-flies distance of the job's site. This allows that default distance to be overridden.

variables.description: The record ID of the contact
variables.name: contactId

variables.description: The date from when the search will start
variables.name: date

value.stringValue: Please make sure you have just one selection so Find Work knows which date to search against.
